hero.subhead: I bridge the gap between robust API development, secure cloud environments, and applied AI research.

services.title: From API design to cloud production — full ownership.
services.intro: From cloud architecture on AWS & OCI to NestJS APIs, CI/CD pipelines, and applied LLM integrations — shipped to production, billed by outcome.
services.ctaTitle: Have a system that needs to scale — or a migration that can't fail?
services.ctaSubtitle: Free 30-min architecture review. MENA timezones welcome.

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture & Migration
cloud.desc: Designing secure, scalable environments on AWS & Oracle Cloud (OCI) — IAM, VPCs, networking, and cost-aware compute.

backend.title: Backend & API Engineering
backend.desc: Production-grade REST & GraphQL APIs with NestJS, Django, and Strapi — auth, payments, and business logic.

devops.title: DevOps & CI/CD Automation
devops.desc: Automated deploys with Docker, GitHub Actions, and Jenkins. Zero-downtime releases and rock-solid rollback paths.

ai.title: Applied AI & LLM Integration
ai.desc: Embedding generative LLMs into corporate apps — smart search, Q&A, and Arabic NLP. Backed by published research at ArabicNLP 2025.

automation.title: Workflow Automation
automation.desc: Event-driven pipelines with n8n to sync APIs, scrape pricing, and replace manual ops.

linux.title: Linux Infra & Enterprise Backup
linux.desc: Linux administration, Nginx, HAProxy, and automated backups with Veeam + OCI Object Storage.

works.title: A few things I've shipped.
works.similarChallengeBody: 30-min architecture review — bring your stack, leave with a concrete plan.

contact.title: Let's build something durable.
contact.blurb: Available for backend engineering, cloud architecture, OCI / AWS migrations, and applied AI work. Typical reply time: under 24 hours.
contact.availableBody: Booking new engagements for next quarter. Flexible across MENA hours, with European overlap.

footer.based: Based in {location} · Building for MENA & beyond.

notFound.title: Project not found.
notFound.body: The case study you're looking for doesn't exist or has moved.
